name: Christmas Ribbons
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter in a large mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add sugar and baking powder, then beat well.
3. Add Egg, vanilla, and lemon or orange extract. Beat until well combined.
4. Incorporate as much flour as possible.
5. Stir the remaining flour with a wooden spoon.
6. Divide dough into three portions.
7. Tint one portion pink using a few drops of red food coloring.
8. Tint another portion light green using a few drops of green food coloring.
9. Leave the third portion plain.
10. Do not chill the dough.
11. Pack the dough into a cookie press, placing pink dough on one side, green on the other, and the plain in the center.
12. Using the ribbon plate, force the dough through the press onto ungreased cookie sheets.
13. Cut into 2-to-3 inch lengths.
14. Bake at 375°F for 6 to 8 minutes or until the edges of the cookies are firm but not brown.
15. Remove from oven and cool on wire racks.
Makes about 60 cookies.
